title: Dry-Season Floods Drench Northern Colombia
description: Villages and farmland were swamped after unusually heavy early-February rains pushed the Sinú River over its banks.
content: Villages and farmland were swamped after unusually heavy early-February rains pushed the Sinú River over its banks.
